data.name: Crisis on Nova-2
data.detailed_description:
Crisis on Nova-2 is a visual novel with clever puzzles, intriguing dialogue, and lots of steamy scenes. It is a character driven story that takes place on the Nova 2, a colony ship headed for the distant reaches of space on a mission to find a habitable planet.


Features

  • Build Actual Relationships- learn about the crew and become close!
  • Solve Puzzles- figure things out around the ship and help the mission!
  • Uncover Mysteries- there's a lot to discover aboard the Nova 2!
  • Explore the Nova 2- adventure around the ship and interact with the sexy crew!

Story

You've been thawed out of cryo-sleep and lost your memory. The ship is in danger! Solve the mysteries of the Nova 2, its mission and its crew!

data.short_description: Crisis on Nova-2 is a visual novel adventure! Solve puzzles and interact with beautiful ladies in this 18+ story!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 870
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
